description: E2E concurrency test: 3 clients submit to the single-GPU service; server processes one at a time (FIFO); client3 polls and pulls its artifacts. Each client passes a client_id (required) and uses the same id (X-Client-Id header) to poll/pull.

client2_bilibili.note: Bilibili (b23.tv short link). Works because the worker uses the logged-in cookies from scripts/bili_login.py (data/bili_cookies.txt / $YT_COOKIES); without them a datacenter IP gets HTTP 412.

then: Each POST returns a per-task pull_token. client3 polls GET /v1/tasks/{id} with header 'X-Task-Token: <pull_token>' until done, then GET /v1/tasks/{id}/artifact (same token) -> zip. client_id is attribution only (not a credential). /v1/queue is the admin view (bearer-gated when TTS_SERVE_API_KEY set).
